questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of a Consensus Algorithm in a Blockchain Network. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on key concepts such as validation, security, and decentralisation

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Smart Contract in a Blockchain Network? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain how Smart Contracts automate business logic and provide transparency

questions.question: Explain the difference between a Public Blockchain and a Private Blockchain. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the implications of each type on security, accessibility, and usage
